          match b, some y with
          | nil, lb => lb
          | node c a y b, lb =>
            match cut y with
            | Ordering.lt => lowerBound? cut a lb
            | Ordering.gt => lowerBound? cut b (some y)
            | Ordering.eq => some y
        | Ordering.eq => some y) =
      some x
